title: 柔光人像 · 电影感
description: 适合写真与角色立绘，强调肤色与眼神光。
usageInstructions: 在 Midjourney 中直接粘贴英文 prompt；可按 --ar 调整画幅。
promptText: cinematic portrait, soft key light, 85mm, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, natural skin texture, editorial photography --ar 2:3 --v 6

title: 霓虹街景 · 赛博氛围
description: 夜景街道与反射材质，偏冷色与体积光。
usageInstructions: 适用于 FLUX 文生图；可叠加强度与步数做细化。
promptText: neon cyberpunk street at night, wet asphalt reflections, volumetric fog, cinematic wide shot, ultra detailed, high contrast, moody blue and magenta lighting

title: 极简产品 · 棚拍
description: 白底/浅灰底产品展示，干净边缘与柔和阴影。
usageInstructions: Ideogram 中适合电商主图；可替换主体描述。
promptText: minimal studio product photography, softbox lighting, seamless light gray backdrop, crisp edges, subtle contact shadow, commercial catalog style

title: 水墨写意 · 东方风格
description: 留白与笔触层次，偏插画与概念艺术。
usageInstructions: Midjourney；可配合 --s 与风格词微调。
promptText: traditional Chinese ink wash painting, expressive brush strokes, misty mountains, negative space, poetic atmosphere, fine art illustration --ar 16:9

title: 杂志人像 · 硬光
description: 高对比时尚片，强调轮廓与布料纹理。
usageInstructions: FLUX；建议固定种子做系列组图。
promptText: editorial fashion portrait, hard studio lighting, dramatic shadows, high contrast black and white, couture fabric texture, Vogue cover aesthetic

title: 奇幻自然 · 远景
description: 史诗感自然场景，云层与远景大气透视。
usageInstructions: Ideogram；适合横版壁纸与概念背景。
promptText: epic fantasy landscape, golden hour, layered clouds, distant mountains, atmospheric perspective, painterly detail, wide panoramic composition
